privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This platform provides listings, projects, and services related to real estate. We commit to protecting the personal data of customers, agents, and partners when using the following features:
privacyPolicy.sector1: Post and manage listings for sale/lease of houses, land, apartments, shophouses
privacyPolicy.sector2: Look up projects, legal status, area amenities, construction progress
privacyPolicy.sector3: Book site visits, schedule viewings, receive consultations and quotations
privacyPolicy.sector4: Receive notifications about matching properties (email, SMS, phone calls)
privacyPolicy.collectContent: We collect contact details, real estate needs, viewing history, and feedback to suggest suitable properties and connect agents/developers per your request. Data is shared only with partners serving the transaction and as required by law.
privacyPolicy.securityContent: We apply access control, encrypted channels, and internal governance to minimize leakage risk. Sensitive data (contact numbers, legal documents) is shown only to related parties with your consent.
privacyPolicy.userRightsContent: You may request access, correction, or deletion of personal data; opt out of marketing notices; withdraw or update sharing scope for agents/partners.
privacyPolicy.contactContent: For questions about this policy, please contact us via the email or hotline published on the website.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.intro: By using this real estate platform, you agree to the following terms:
termsOfService.point1: The platform serves information and connections only for real estate (sale, lease, projects, consulting).
termsOfService.point2: Listing owners are responsible for accuracy, legality, pricing, media, and transactionability of their properties.
termsOfService.point3: Seekers/viewers must assess and verify information before transacting; we do not represent or guarantee any party.
termsOfService.point4: We forward reasonable feedback/claims but are not legally liable for disputes between parties.
termsOfService.point5: Users must not post illegal, misleading content, infringe third-party rights, or distort the market.
termsOfService.point6: We may temporarily hide, remove listings, or restrict accounts if violations or fraud signals are detected.
termsOfService.point7: Terms may be updated; continuing to use the platform means you accept changes.
termsOfService.rightsContent: Users may post/search listings and schedule viewings; they must comply with law, provide truthful information, and cooperate during verification.
termsOfService.limitsContent: We are not liable for financial/legal losses or disputes between users and partners; our responsibility is limited to what the platform provides and the extent allowed by law.
termsOfService.contactContent: For questions about these terms, please contact us via the email or hotline published on the website.
